overview: Click-Style Oxygen Regulators are designed for precise and reliable oxygen flow control in medical applications.Constructed with a durable aluminum body and brass high-pressure chamber, the regulator ensures safety, longevity, and consistent performance.The click-style mechanism allows accurate preset flow selection, making it ideal for hospital and emergency use.

specs.label: Packaging
specs.value: 20 pcs / carton &  Carton size: 40.5 × 15.5 × 35.5 cm & Gross weight: 9.8 kg

features: Aluminum body with brass high-pressure chamber
Inlet connection complies with CGA standards
Internal relief valve for safety protection
Customizable color options (green, blue, yellow, etc.)
Piston design regulator for stable performance
Sintered bronze inlet filter for extended service life
Each unit includes 12 fixed flow settings for precise control
